clinicalProblem.clinicalIntent: Identify and classify dietary, metabolic, and environmental factors that influence blood pressure regulation
clinicalProblem.whenToUse: Hypertension risk assessment, lifestyle modification planning, environmental exposure screening
clinicalProblem.decisionOrAction: Risk factor identification + targeted intervention recommendations

navigationPath.purpose: Entry point for BP determinant assessment
Assess sodium, potassium, alcohol, fiber, calcium, magnesium, plant protein intake
Evaluate weight, BMI, insulin resistance, metabolic health
Capture age and age-related risk modifiers
Screen for sleep apnea, psychosocial stressors
Assess physical activity and fitness levels
Evaluate air pollution and heavy metal exposures
Display risk factor profile + mitigation strategies

validationRules: Sodium and potassium preferably measured by urinary excretion

rules: Identify primary dietary factors: high sodium, low potassium, alcohol overuse
Identify secondary dietary factors: low fiber, low calcium, low magnesium, low plant protein
Assess metabolic contributors: weight gain, overweight/obesity, insulin resistance
Apply age, obesity, and insulin resistance as sodium sensitivity modifiers
Flag obstructive sleep apnea and psychosocial stressors as exacerbating factors
Evaluate physical activity and fitness as ameliorating factors
Screen for environmental toxins: air pollution, heavy metals
Generate cumulative risk score based on factor count and severity
Provide lifestyle modification prioritization based on evidence strength

primaryFactors.description: List of predominant risk factors identified

secondaryFactors.description: List of moderate impact factors identified

sodiumSensitivity.description: Modified by age, obesity, insulin resistance

appDisplay.screenType: Risk factor education and modification planning

nextStepRouting.providerSuggestion: Refer to lifestyle medicine or nutrition counseling for multiple dietary factors
nextStepRouting.followUpTiming: Reassess in 3 months after lifestyle modifications
nextStepRouting.repeatMeasurement: Repeat urinary sodium/potassium excretion after dietary changes
nextStepRouting.navigatorEscalation: Flag severe obesity (BMI≥35) or insulin resistance for metabolic referral
nextStepRouting.documentation: Log all risk factors to longitudinal health record with trend tracking
